ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary – Booked with Air India – Confirmation
ham.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

Thank you for choosing Air India for your upcoming travel. This email contains your flight itinerary details for your journey from Delhi to Mumbai.

Booking Reference: AI123456789

Flight: AI-102
Departure: 15th April 2026, 10:30 AM (DEL) – Arrive: 15th April 2026, 12:00 PM (BOM)

Seat Allocation: 12A (Window)

Please review the itinerary and let us know if you need any changes. You can also manage your booking by logging into your Air India account at <URL>.

Safe travels,
Air India Customer Care

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Your Microsoft 365 Password Is About to Expire
spam.body:
Hello,

We have detected suspicious activity on your Microsoft 365 account. As part of our security policy, your password will expire in 48 hours. Please verify your credentials immediately to avoid losing access to your email, documents, and OneDrive.

Click the link below to reset your password and secure your account:
<URL>

If you do not act within the next 48 hours, your account will be automatically disabled. This is a mandatory compliance measure to protect your personal and corporate data.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Regards,
Microsoft Security Team
